task_completion.description: Create the R script for the predictive maintenance model
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'rul_analysis.R' in /home/ga/RProjects/ containing R code for reading data, training a model, and generating predictions.

task_completion.description: Include rolling or lagged feature engineering in the script
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of 'rul_analysis.R' for evidence of time-series feature engineering, such as the use of functions like 'rollmean', 'lag', 'slide', or similar rolling window calculations.

task_completion.description: Export test set predictions to a CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'rul_predictions.csv' in /home/ga/RProjects/output/ containing columns 'Engine_ID' and 'Predicted_RUL'.

task_completion.description: Save the RMSE metric to a CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'model_metrics.csv' in /home/ga/RProjects/output/ containing columns 'metric' and 'value', with the metric being RMSE.

task_completion.description: Save a scatter plot of Predicted vs. Actual RUL
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an image file named 'rul_performance_plot.png' in /home/ga/RProjects/output/ that displays a scatter plot comparing predicted and actual RUL values.

integrity.description: Verify that the outputs were generated by running the R script
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output or R console logs showing the execution of 'rul_analysis.R' rather than the agent manually creating the CSV and PNG files.

integrity.description: Ensure metrics and predictions are calculated, not hardcoded
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the R script to confirm that the RMSE and predictions are dynamically computed from the model evaluation, not typed out as static values.

integrity.description: Verify the scatter plot is a genuine R-generated plot
integrity.visual_evidence: The scatter plot should have the visual characteristics of an R plot (e.g., base R graphics or ggplot2 styling) and not appear to be an image downloaded from the internet.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output paths are exactly: /home/ga/RProjects/rul_analysis.R, /home/ga/RProjects/output/rul_predictions.csv (expecting 100 test engines), /home/ga/RProjects/output/model_metrics.csv, and /home/ga/RProjects/output/rul_performance_plot.png. The script must contain rolling or lagged feature engineering. Note: The default dataset files in the environment are 0-byte empty files due to a dead link in the setup script. The agent may fail to generate the outputs unless it identifies this issue and downloads the NASA CMAPSS FD001 dataset from an alternative source.
